sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51126" key="i)soplhqo/pleuros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσο-πληθόπλευρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n51126.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having an equal number of sides</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐθύγραμμα, σχήματα</foreign>, Anon.Geom.in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2032.tlg001:1142:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Papp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1142.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
